description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden cabinet with a single front-facing door featuring a carved arch detail and a metallic handle. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural, light finish. The cabinet appears solid on all sides except the front, which has the only visible access point. The handle is metallic and positioned vertically near the lower left of the door, suggesting the door swings open. The top and sides are plain, with no additional features or ornamentation. This type of cabinet is commonly used for storage in urban environments such as garages, utility rooms, or on sidewalks for secure storage.
description: A small, light wood cabinet with a single carved door and a metallic handle, designed for storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cabinet door with a carved arch detail and a metallic handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, unadorned wooden surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, featureless wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wooden surface and a slight glimpse of the handle from the front.
